body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: MPLS Network Actions for Transporting In Situ Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (IOAM) Data Fields and Direct Exporting
MPLS Network Action for Deterministic Latency
Supporting In-Situ Operations, Administration, and Maintenance Direct Export Using MPLS Network Actions
04 - Supporting In-Situ Operations, Administration, and Maintenance Direct Export Using MPLS Network Actions
05 - MPLS Network Actions for Transporting IOAM Data Fields and Direct Exporting
06 - MPLS Network Action for Deterministic Latency
